languages.text: "Здесь я вынужден покинуть вас и вашу свиту. Мы встретимся вновь, если такую судьбу уготовил нам Бог-Император. Если же нет..." {n}Себериан склоняет голову.{/n} "... тогда слова прощания лучше произнести сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "Здесь я вынужден покинуть вас и вашу свиту. Мы встретимся вновь, если такую судьбу уготовил нам Бог-Император. Если же нет..." {n}Себериан склоняет голову.{/n} "... тогда слова прощания лучше произнести сейчас".

languages.text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."
languages.original_text: "Здесь я вынужден покинуть вас и вашу свиту. Мы встретимся вновь, если такую судьбу уготовил нам Бог-Император. Если же нет..." {n}Себериан склоняет голову.{/n} "... тогда слова прощания лучше произнести сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor. And if we are not—" {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "—then our farewells are best said now."

"This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor. And if we are not—" {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "—then our farewells are best said now."

"This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

"This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

languages.text: "Ich muss mich nun von Euch und Eurem Gefolge verabschieden. Wir werden uns wiedersehen, wenn es der Wille des Gottimperators ist. Und wenn nicht", {n}Seberian senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Dann sollten wir uns am besten jetzt verabschieden."
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss mich nun von Euch und Eurem Gefolge verabschieden. Wir werden uns wiedersehen, wenn es der Wille des Gottimperators ist. Und wenn nicht", {n}Seberian senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Dann sollten wir uns am besten jetzt verabschieden."

languages.text: « Il est temps pour moi de prendre congé. Nous nous retrouverons un jour, si l'Empereur-Dieu le veut. Et s'Il ne le veut pas... » {n}Seberian incline la tête.{/n} « Alors, autant nous dire adieu tout de suite. »
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: « Il est temps pour moi de prendre congé. Nous nous retrouverons un jour, si l'Empereur-Dieu le veut. Et s'Il ne le veut pas... » {n}Seberian incline la tête.{/n} « Alors, autant nous dire adieu tout de suite. »

languages.text: «Es el momento de que les abandone a usted y a su séquito. Volveremos a encontrarnos, si ese es el destino que nos depara la voluntad del Dios Emperador. Si no...». {n}Seberian agacha la cabeza{/n}. «Será mejor despedirse ahora».
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: «Es el momento de que les abandone a usted y a su séquito. Volveremos a encontrarnos, si ese es el destino que nos depara la voluntad del Dios Emperador. Si no...». {n}Seberian agacha la cabeza{/n}. «Será mejor despedirse ahora».

languages.text: "Senden ve maiyetinden burada ayrılmam gerekiyor. Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi uygun görürse tekrar görüşeceğiz. Görmezse de..." {n}Seberian başını eğiyor.{/n} "O zaman şimdi birbirimize veda etmemiz en iyisi olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: "Senden ve maiyetinden burada ayrılmam gerekiyor. Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi uygun görürse tekrar görüşeceğiz. Görmezse de..." {n}Seberian başını eğiyor.{/n} "O zaman şimdi birbirimize veda etmemiz en iyisi olacaktır."

languages.text: “我必须在此，与你和你的随从告别了。若神皇的意志注定你我重逢，那自有重逢之日。若神皇的意志并非如此，”{n}塞贝里安低下了头，{/n}“那我们最好就在此刻，好好告别。”
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: “我必须在此，与你和你的随从告别了。若神皇的意志注定你我重逢，那自有重逢之日。若神皇的意志并非如此，”{n}塞贝里安低下了头，{/n}“那我们最好就在此刻，好好告别。”

languages.text: 「ここで別れを告げます。神帝の御意により再会できるとなれば、また会いますが、そうでなければ、今ここで別れを告げます。」{n}セベリアンは頭を下げる.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."

traits.locale_text: 「ここで別れを告げます。神帝の御意により再会できるとなれば、また会いますが、そうでなければ、今ここで別れを告げます。」{n}セベリアンは頭を下げる.{/n}
